name: QAOA - Travelling Salesman Problem
author: openqc-team
description: Solve the Travelling Salesman Problem using QAOA with QUBO penalty encoding. N cities are mapped to N^2 binary variables (x_{i,p} = city i at position p). Constraints enforce each city visited once and each position filled once. Practical for 3 cities (9 qubits). Based on Lucas, Frontiers in Physics 2:5 (2014).

metadata.complexity_classical: O(n!) brute force, O(n^2 * 2^n) dynamic programming
